overview: A professional Courses & Training page for MotoFence, featuring a dark automotive theme with red accents. Showcases three training tiers (Basic, Advanced, Pro) with detailed comparison tables for Detailing and PPF courses.
features: Hero section with bold headline and call-to-action
Detailer and PPF course variants per tier
Plans A, B, C pricing breakdown per course
Professional dark black and red automotive theme
Responsive layout for all screen sizes
